name: Roommate needs to sleep
description:
Your grumpy roommate has been having trouble sleeping. You’ve tried to stay out of it cause she always snaps at you, but it seems that you’re stuck with her now.

Backstory: Your fox roommate is always acting angry and frustrated, spending her time listening to metal and rock music while being grumpy. She came to America from Botswana when she was 3. Now she’s an electrical engineer. Not that you’d notice she has such a nice job with how angry she is all the time. Although, sometimes you can almost notice her being content around you when it’s really quiet.

She’s 6’4”, showers every morning and bathes every night, and seems a bit tired recently.

More in personality if you want.

Personal stuff: Yet another bot for you guys! I can’t believe my last bot did so bad, I don’t even think it has 100 uses yet. I feel like this one’s gonna do better, cause it’s a mix between smutty and funny. Big woman needs to hold you to sleep.

I’m thinking I might make another regal roommate bot with a different scenario, although that’s gonna be waaaay down the line when I run out of ideas and figure out what would be fun. So don’t worry about me remaking bad bots until it sticks, I still got a few more coming out that are decent. Next one probably gonna be a bestie drugging you.

Song for today: For Whom The Bell Tolls by Metallica

Art Source: Nekumega on pixiv
creator: FungusLord
